item.name: Potglaze Stingray
item.description:
The orange splotches adorning this freshwater ray contrast with its otherwise inky coloration.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Stories tell of a Moblin artisan who, as a jest, finished one of their pots with a rather unsightly glaze. Allegedly, the artless creation gained a mind of its own and transformed into a stingray. Thanks to the fanciful tale, this wavekin has earned itself admirers among earthenware aficionados.
